detail.description:
“Would you like to connect with me, Connector?”

One day, the sky was torn apart.
“Shugel,” a high-dimensional space race that appeared through Anchor Point.
Before their eyes, humanity was nothing more than a feeble flame, a dying fate.

“Star Chain”—
The last fortress made of stars.
The moment destruction approaches—
The defensive barrier covering the planet protected us.

Now, it's time to fight back.
“AIMBS-Link System” recreated the selected girls as “agents”, supernatural combat agents.
Af
